products.name: Large Beach Tote Bag
products.description: This super useful tote bag is able to hold 52 litres and has a handy zipped pocket on the inside for valuables. It will easily fit all the towels, swimsuits and books needed for a family trip to the beach. The gorgeous Liberty print appliqued to the bags front and its straps means this bag is equally at home on a Cornish beach or poolside in the Caribbean. Approx Dimensions: 72cm W x 48cm H x 15cm D Choose from a selection of Liberty prints below.

products.name: Large Tote Bag
products.subtitle: ‘Baby’, ‘Sail’, ‘Shop’
products.description: This super useful large tote bag can hold 52 Litres and has a handy zipped pocket on the inside for valuables. We first started making this for the beach but then had requests for new mums (perfect for all the nappies, muslins, wipes, bottles/snacks), boating friends, divers and those just wanting a great shopping bag. We therefore added the following customised options: ‘Baby’, ‘Sail’, ‘Shop’, ‘Dive’. Approx Dimensions: 72cm W x 48cm H x 15cm D

products.name: Large Tote Bag
products.subtitle: Bespoke
products.description: Our super useful large tote bag can hold 52 Litres and has a handy zipped pocket on the inside for valuables. We are delighted to take bespoke orders for the word/name appliqued to the front of the bag. The space can take up to 5 letters. It is also possible to add a felt backed ‘stitch drawn’ or applique design from our existing range to the inside pocket of the bag. Please contact emily@nankilly.com to arrange. Approx Dimensions: 72cm W x 48cm H x 15cm D

products.name: Personalised Child’s Bunting
products.description: A lovely accessory for a child’s bedroom or gift for a new baby. We have a range of gorgeous bookend designs to choose from. Simply select your preferred design and fabric, plus share the name below - we’ll do the rest. Each set of bunting comes with a generous amount of tie length at either end, to ensure a perfect display. Please note Windy Days Fabric is currently out of stock.

products.name: Flower Jug Cushion
products.subtitle: Daffodils & Lily of the Valley
products.description: Featuring a traditional Cornishware Jug with a bouquet of Daffodils and Lily of the Valley. The jug and flowers are created from fabric scraps, using a combination of applique and ‘stitch drawing’ free motion quilting to build up the design. The back is in blue and white ticking stripe which is carried through to the surrounding piping. The cushions come complete with feather inner. Approx dimensions: 50cm W x 30cm H Please note, as each bouquet is made with fabric scraps and includes ‘stitch drawing’, designs may vary slightly. If you would like to see an example proof of your cushion before completing your order, please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Flower Jug Cushion
products.subtitle: Peonies & Forget-Me-Nots
products.description: Featuring a traditional Cornishware Jug with a bouquet of Peonies and Forget-Me-Nots. The jug and flowers are created from fabric scraps, using a combination of applique and ‘stitch drawing’ free motion quilting to build up the design. The back is in blue and white ticking stripe which is carried through to the surrounding piping. The cushions come complete with feather inner. Approx dimensions: 45cm W x 45cm H Please note, as each bouquet is made with fabric scraps and includes ‘stitch drawing’, designs may vary slightly. If you would like to see an example proof of your cushion before completing your order, please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Glamping Cushion
products.description: Inspired by the Glamping accommodation we offer at Nankilly Farm. Featuring Glamping tents, with a hare and pheasant (common sights here at the Farm) in the foreground and birds in the sky. The cushions are further embellished with hand embroidered flowers. Vintage inspired ruffle surrounds in Liberty Prints, linen backs with hidden envelope zips and feather inners complete the piece. Dimensions: 45cm x 45cm Pictures show cushions ready to ship. If you would like a bespoke cushion created, please contact emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Hare Cushion
products.description: Inspired by the Hares which live in the fields surrounding Nankilly Farm. These cushions use the reverse applique sewing technique to create a layered, textured effect. Available in a range of beautiful Liberty Prints. The back is in blue and white ticking stripe which extends to a piped border. Cushions come complete with feather inner. Approx dimensions: 50cm W x 30cm H If you would like to order a pair of cushions with the Hares facing each other please contact me to arrange, emily@nankilly.com. Inners can also be switched from feather to polyester if preferred. Choose from a selection of Liberty Prints:

products.name: Rajasthan Ruffle Cushions
products.description: The beautiful floral patterns on these large cotton cushions are crafted using traditional block printing techniques. Each feather-filled cushion is handmade at Nankilly Farm in Cornwall and features a vintage-inspired frilled border and a hidden envelope zip on the back for a luxury finish. Approx Dimensions: 48 cm x 48cm

products.name: Surfer Boy Cushion
products.description: Inspired by our sons love of surfing, the Cornish waves, stunning beaches, and coastal flowers. These cushions are perfect for the water baby in your life and look fabulous in a coastal home. Available in different hair and skin colour options. Each cushion is unique and combines 3 x strips of contrasting fabric with a quilted back for added softness, to create the sand, sea and sky. The waves and flowers are ‘stitch drawn’ using the free motion quilting technique and the surfer, board and seagulls then appliqued to the front. The back is in blue and white ticking stripe which extends to a piped border. Cushions come complete with feather inner. Approx dimensions: 50cm W x 30cm H Please note, as each cushion is handmade with fabric scraps and ‘stitch drawn’ each piece is unique and will vary slightly. Inners can be switched from feather to polyester if preferred. If you would like to see an example proof, switch your inner or further personalise your cushion before completing your order, please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Surfer Girl Cushion
products.description: Inspired by our sons love of surfing, the Cornish waves, stunning beaches, and coastal flowers. These cushions are perfect for the water baby in your life and look fabulous in a coastal home. Available in different hair and skin colour options. Each cushion is unique and combines 3 x strips of contrasting fabric with a quilted back for added softness, to create the sand, sea and sky. The waves and flowers are ‘stitch drawn’ using the free motion quilting technique and the surfer, board and seagulls then appliqued to the front. The back is in blue and white ticking stripe which extends to a piped border. Cushions come complete with feather inner. Approx dimensions: 50cm W x 30cm H Please note, as each cushion is handmade with fabric scraps and ‘stitch drawn’ each piece is unique and will vary slightly. Inners can be switched from feather to polyester if preferred. If you would like to see an example proof, switch your inner or further personalise your cushion before completing your order, please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Duck Fabric Pot
products.description: These versatile Fabric Storage Pots are perfect for organizing small items like keys, jewellery, cosmetics, and more. We also love using them as pretty covers for indoor flowerpots. Each pot features our one-of-a-kind design of waddling and flying ducks. The pair of waddling Indian Runner ducks appear twice - once on the front and again on the back, with a flying drake duck in the centre. Meticulously crafted from a collage of cherished fabric scraps and ‘stitch drawn’ to bring them to life, the design is framed by delicate, freehand embroidered foliage and complemented by a durable blue-and-white ticking lining. Every piece is a unique work of art, designed to be treasured for years to come. Approx Dimensions: 12cm High x 47cm Diameter Please note, as each pot is handmade using ‘stitch drawing’ and fabric scraps, designs may vary. If you would like to see an example proof of your pot before completing your order, please contact me emily@nankilly,com to arrange.

products.name: Hare Fabric Pot
products.description: Introducing our versatile Fabric Storage Pots! Perfect for tidying up small items like keys, jewellery, cosmetics, and more, these lovely pots are also great as covers for indoor flowerpots. Each pot features delightful appliqué designs of sitting and leaping hares, surrounded by freehand embroidered foliage, making them truly unique. Lined with blue and white ticking, these pots add a touch of rural charm to any space. Please note, as each pot is handmade with fabric scraps, designs may vary. If you would like to see an example proof of your pot before completing your order, please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange. Approx Dimensions: 12cm High x 47cm Diameter

products.name: Paddleboarder Fabric Pot
products.description: This handy pot offers storage for anywhere in the home you need a splash of happy coastal memories. Use it by the front door for keys and coins, in the bedroom for jewellery or hair bobbles, in the craft room, office or kitchen for pens, fabric, threads or anything else you fancy. Featuring two blonde paddleboarding couples being eyed up by several inquisitive seals, against a backdrop of ‘stitch drawn’ waves. Made in a bright blue sturdy cotton with a striking blue and white stripe lining. Approx Dimensions: 12cm High x 47cm Diameter Please note, as each paddleboarder and seal is made with fabric scraps, designs will vary. If you would like to personalise your order by changing skin or hair (colour/length) please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Pheasant Fabric Pot
products.description: These versatile Fabric Storage Pots are perfect for organizing small items like keys, jewellery, cosmetics, and more. We also love using them as pretty covers for indoor flowerpots. Each pot showcases our one-of-a-kind Mr. and Mrs. Pheasant design, featured twice -once on the front and again on the back. Carefully crafted from a collage of cherished fabric scraps and meticulously ‘stitch drawn’ to bring them to life, the design is surrounded by delicate, freehand embroidered foliage, complemented by a durable blue and white ticking lining. Every piece is a unique work of art, designed to be treasured for years to come. Approx Dimensions: 12cm High x 47cm Diameter Please note, as each pot is handmade using ‘stitch drawing’ and fabric scraps, designs may vary. If you would like to see an example proof of your pot before completing your order, please contact me emily@nankilly,com to arrange.

products.name: Surfer Fabric Pot
products.description: This handy pot offers storage for anywhere in the home you need a splash of happy coastal memories. Use it by the front door for keys and coins, in the bedroom for jewellery or hair bobbles, in the craft room, office or kitchen for pens, fabric, threads or anything else you fancy. Featuring two blonde surfers and their boards, against a backdrop of ‘stitch drawn’ waves. Made in a bright blue sturdy cotton with a striking blue and white stripe lining. Choose whether you want two boys, two girls or one of each on your pot. Approx Dimensions: 12cm High x 47cm Diameter Please note, as each surfer is made with fabric scraps, the colours of their wetsuits and boards will vary. If you have a wetsuit or board colour preference or would like to personalise your order by changing skin or hair (colour/length) please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Wakeboarding Fabric Pot
products.description: Inspired by a good friend who absolutely loves this sport. This handy pot offers storage for anywhere in the home you need a splash of happy waterside memories. Use it by the front door for keys and coins, in the bedroom for jewellery or hair bobbles, in the craft room, office or kitchen for pens, fabric, threads or anything else you fancy. Featuring a speed boat pulling a female wakeboarder against a backdrop of ‘stitch drawn’ waves. Made in a bright blue sturdy cotton with a striking blue and white stripe lining. Approx Dimensions: 12cm High x 47cm Diameter Please note, as each boat, driver and wakeboarder are made with fabric scraps, designs will vary. If you would like to personalise your order or see an example proof of your pot before completing your purchase, please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Divers Pouch
products.description: We first made these as a bespoke request for a couple passionate about Scuba Diving, who were about to tie the knot. If you or someone you know are keen Divers, then this is the pouch for you. Each bag is unique, with ‘stitch drawn’ free motion waves quilted to the front and over laid with applique divers using treasured fabric scraps. The back is in blue and white ticking stripe with vibrant waterproof lining in a variety of complementary prints. Approx Dimensions: 23cm W x 15cm H If you would like to personalise your order or see an example proof of your pouch before completing your purchase, please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Large Initial Pouch
products.description: These large, navy, personalised, organic cotton pouches are so useful. Popular as a gift for new mums featuring babies initial, as the size is perfect for storing nappies, wipes, and cream. Alternatively, just enjoy them as something lovely in which to keep all your stuff. The chosen initial is appliqued in the fabric of your choice and surrounded by a border stitched in silver thread. Approx Dimensions: 33cm W x 22cm H Choose from a selection of Liberty prints

products.name: Paddleboarder Pouch
products.description: Inspired by our love of the Cornish South Coast, it’s still waters and tributaries and paddleboarding culture. These pouches with waterproof lining are perfect for stashing cosmetics, pencils, sweets, surf wax, suncream, or anything else you fancy. Each bag is unique, with ‘stitch drawn’ free motion waves quilted to the front and over laid with an applique paddleboarding couple using treasured fabric scraps. The back is in blue and white ticking stripe with vibrant waterproof lining in a variety of complementary prints. Approx Dimensions: 23cm W x 15cm H Please note, as each paddleboarding couple is made with fabric scraps, designs may vary slightly. If you would like to see an example proof of your pouch before completing your order, please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Small Initial Pouch
products.description: Keep everything organised with our personalised, organic cotton, cream canvas pouches. Perfect for keeping cosmetics, hair accessories, pencils or whatever else you fancy. These pouches make a fabulous and thoughtful gift. A floral border design surrounds your chosen initial and the bag is finished with a matching fabric zip pull. Approx Dimensions: 26cm W x 17cm H Choose from a selection of Liberty prints

products.name: Surfer Pouch
products.description: Inspired by our love of the Cornish surf these pouches with waterproof lining are perfect for stashing cosmetics, pencils, sweets, surf wax, suncream, or anything else you fancy. Each bag is unique, with ‘stitch drawn’ free motion waves quilted to the front and over laid with an applique surfer using treasured fabric scraps. The back is in blue and white ticking stripe with vibrant waterproof lining in a variety of complementary prints. Approx Dimensions: 23cm W x 15cm H Please note, as each surfer is made with fabric scraps, wetsuits and board colours will vary. We also vary the colour of the waves between white and blue depending on which we think works best for your individual pouch. If you would like to personalise your order or see an example proof of your pouch before completing your purchase, please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Nankilly Lavender Bird
products.description: Inspired by the garden birds at Nankilly Farm and treasured fabric scraps begging for new life. Each Nankilly Bird is unique using ‘Stitch Drawing’ to free motion embroider the applique bird and create the surrounding foliage. The bags are backed in a variety of pretty floral cottons and filled with lavender harvested from the garden. Nankilly Birds are a hand-crafted special and sustainable gift which will make your home smell wonderful and protect your clothes from moths. Approx Dimensions: 11cm W x 13cm H. Every bird is unique as they’re sustainably made with fabric scraps and stitch drawn. Please select your preferred colour way for the bird below. If you have a bespoke colour request or would like to see an example proof before completing your order, please contact me on emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

products.name: Little Fox and Moses Basket
products.description: This adorable small toy Fox, complete with overalls and carry cot, was inspired by a pair of fox cubs spotted early one morning in the woods by Nankilly Farm. The cot, crafted from quilted Liberty ‘Emily Belle’ cotton fabric and lined with soft linen, provides a snug haven for Little Fox. Complete with a miniature pillow and quilt for sweet dreams. Each Little Fox is unique and comes dressed in its own set of overalls, lovingly made from our treasure chest of fabric scraps. An ideal companion for children who adore imaginative play, this set promises endless adventures and cuddles. Dimensions – Height 13cm Please note the material for the Fox overalls will vary. Please contact emily@nankilly.com if you have a specific request or would like to see a proof before completing your order. Choose from a selection of Liberty ‘Emily Belle’ colour ways for your Carry Cot.

products.name: Little Wolf and Moses Basket
products.description: This adorable small toy Wolf, complete with overalls and carry cot, is the cousin to our original Little Fox. The cot, crafted from quilted Liberty ‘Emily Belle’ cotton fabric and lined with soft linen, provides a snug haven for Little Wolf. Complete with a miniature pillow and quilt for sweet dreams. Each Little Wolf is unique and comes dressed in its own set of overalls, lovingly made from our treasure chest of fabric scraps. An ideal companion for children who adore imaginative play, this set promises endless adventures and cuddles. Dimensions – Height 13cm Please note the material for the Wolf overalls will vary. Please contact emily@nankilly.com if you have a specific request or would like to see a proof before completing your order. Choose from a selection of Liberty ‘Emily Belle’ colour ways for your Carry Cot.

products.name: Indian Block Print Washbag
products.description: Ethically sourced Indian block print fabric, quilted for added luxury, with a water-resistant lining and coloured or metal zip. Beautiful, tactile, unique and functional. Works equally brilliantly as a child’s pencil case. Choose from a selection of Indian block prints. Dimensions: 20cm x 10cm x 9cm

products.name: Personalised Indian Block Print Washbag
products.description: Ethically sourced Indian block print fabric, quilted for added luxury, with a water-resistant lining and coloured or metal zip. Beautiful, tactile, unique and functional. Works equally brilliantly as a child’s pencil case. These washbags can be personalised to create something truly special. The space can comfortably take names/words of up to 5 letters Approx Dimensions: 20cm W x 10cm H x 9cm D If you’d like to see an example proof before committing to your order please contact me emily@nankilly.com to arrange.

Accompanied by Hare, Star, and Reindeer motifs in Liberty's Emily Belle Red, these sacks make a timeless addition to your festive traditions, designed to be cherished and used year after year. Approx Dimensions: 71cm H x 57cm W
